findings.summary: Glossary term spanning a sentence split boundary is silently dropped.
findings.detail: extractGlossary receives full paragraph strings; anchorGlossary searches within sentences.
findings.suggestion: Log a warning when a term cannot be located in any sentence.

unanchored.summary: ALLOWED_TAGS embeds ~6 KB of tag vocabulary in every prompt.
unanchored.detail: tags.ts joins all 770 tags into the prompt.
